'''zadaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadscape|roadscape]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-d-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadscape|roadscape]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zadaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zædæyæth|zædæyæth]] || [[word:zædæyæj|zædæyæj]] || [[word:zædæyæsh|zædæyæsh]] || [[word:zædæyæ|zædæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadadayath|zadadayath]] || [[word:zadadayaj|zadadayaj]] || [[word:zadadayash|zadadayash]] || [[word:zadadaya|zadadaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadayath|zadayath]] || [[word:zadayaj|zadayaj]] || [[word:zadayash|zadayash]] || [[word:zadaya|zadaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zadafyath|zadafyath]] || [[word:zadafyaj|zadafyaj]] || [[word:zadafyash|zadafyash]] || [[word:zadafyaf|zadafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zadayatha|zadayatha]] || [[word:zadayaja|zadayaja]] || [[word:zadayasha|zadayasha]] || [[word:zadayaka|zadayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zadayath|zadayath]] || [[word:zadayaj|zadayaj]] || [[word:zadayash|zadayash]] || [[word:zadaya|zadaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zadayathal|zadayathal]] || [[word:zadayajal|zadayajal]] || [[word:zadayashal|zadayashal]] || [[word:zadayakal|zadayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zadayathatha|zadayathatha]] || [[word:zadayajaja|zadayajaja]] || [[word:zadayashasha|zadayashasha]] || [[word:zadayaka|zadayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zadayathan|zadayathan]] || [[word:zadayajan|zadayajan]] || [[word:zadayashan|zadayashan]] || [[word:zadayakan|zadayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zadayathaoro|zadayathaoro]] || [[word:zadayajaoro|zadayajaoro]] || [[word:zadayashaoro|zadayashaoro]] || [[word:zadayakaoro|zadayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
